name: Alibaba Qwen
description: Alibaba Qwen — Alibaba's family of open-source and API-accessible LLMs supporting multilingual and multimodal tasks.

seo.title: Alibaba Qwen — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Alibaba Qwen: Alibaba Qwen — Alibaba's family of open-source and API-accessible LLMs supporting multilingual and multimodal tasks.

when_to_use: Building multilingual chatbots with strong CJK language support
Running open-weight Qwen models on-premise for data privacy
Generating code completions with Qwen-Coder for IDE plugins
Multimodal image-understanding tasks via Qwen-VL API
Cost-effective LLM inference for high-volume Chinese text

cons: Docs and community thinner in English
review.verdict: The open-weights champion for teams operating in or across Chinese-speaking markets.
review.best_for: APAC developers needing multilingual LLMs with self-host option
review.not_for: US/EU enterprises with strict data residency requirements

lock_in.reason: Open-weight Qwen models downloadable under Apache 2.0

transparency.reason: Freemium API with public pricing and open weights

developer_experience.reason: Hugging Face, vLLM, and DashScope SDK support
